mapper.sql: select log_id, institution_id, transaction_no, transaction_type, amount, balance_before, balance_after, transaction_time, business_type, related_order_id, related_transfer_id, business_desc, counterparty, operator, create_time from supervision_account_log

select sal.log_id, sal.institution_id, sal.transaction_no, sal.transaction_type, sal.amount, sal.balance_before, sal.balance_after, sal.transaction_time, sal.business_type, sal.related_order_id, sal.related_transfer_id, sal.business_desc, sal.counterparty, sal.operator, sal.create_time, pi.institution_name from supervision_account_log sal left join pension_institution pi on sal.institution_id = pi.institution_id
mapper.select: where sal.institution_id = #{institutionId} order by sal.transaction_time desc
where sal.related_order_id = #{orderId} order by sal.transaction_time desc
where sal.related_transfer_id = #{transferId} order by sal.transaction_time desc
select balance_after from supervision_account_log where institution_id = #{institutionId} order by transaction_time desc limit 1

select coalesce(sum(case when transaction_type = '收入' then amount else 0 end), 0) as totalIncome, coalesce(sum(case when transaction_type = '支出' then amount else 0 end), 0) as totalExpense, coalesce(sum(amount), 0) as totalAmount from supervision_account_log where institution_id = #{institutionId} and transaction_time between #{startDate} and #{endDate}
mapper.insert:
insert into supervision_account_log
institution_id, transaction_no, transaction_type, amount, balance_before, balance_after, transaction_time, business_type, related_order_id, related_transfer_id, business_desc, counterparty, operator, create_time,
#{institutionId}, #{transactionNo}, #{transactionType}, #{amount}, #{balanceBefore}, #{balanceAfter}, #{transactionTime}, #{businessType}, #{relatedOrderId}, #{relatedTransferId}, #{businessDesc}, #{counterparty}, #{operator}, #{createTime},
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE( (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(transfer_amount), 0) FROM fund_transfer WHERE institution_id = #{institutionId} AND is_paid != '1' AND transfer_type != '3') -- 未拨付的拨付单金额（不含押金划拨） + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(deposit_balance), 0) FROM account_info WHERE institution_id = #{institutionId}) -- 所有老人押金总和 + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(member_balance), 0) FROM account_info WHERE institution_id = #{institutionId}) -- 所有老人会员费总和 - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(transfer_amount), 0) FROM fund_transfer WHERE institution_id = #{institutionId} AND transfer_type = '3' AND is_paid = '1'), 0 -- 已拨付的押金金额 0) as balance
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(transfer_amount), 0) FROM fund_transfer WHERE institution_id = #{institutionId} AND is_paid != '1' AND transfer_type != '3' -- 不含押金划拨（特殊申请）

SELECT pi.institution_id as institutionId, pi.institution_name as institutionName, pi.supervise_account as superviseAccount, pi.supervise_bank as superviseBank, pi.bank_account as bankAccount, pi.basic_bank as basicBank, pi.supervise_account_status as accountStatus, pi.status as institutionStatus, pi.approve_time as approveTime, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(transfer_amount), 0) FROM fund_transfer WHERE institution_id = pi.institution_id AND is_paid != '1' AND transfer_type != '3') as prepaidBalance, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(deposit_balance), 0) FROM account_info WHERE institution_id = pi.institution_id) as depositBalance, ((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(transfer_amount), 0) FROM fund_transfer WHERE institution_id = pi.institution_id AND is_paid != '1' AND transfer_type != '3') + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(deposit_balance), 0) FROM account_info WHERE institution_id = pi.institution_id) + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(member_balance), 0) FROM account_info WHERE institution_id = pi.institution_id) - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(transfer_amount), 0) FROM fund_transfer WHERE institution_id = pi.institution_id AND transfer_type = '3' AND is_paid = '1')) as supervisionBalance FROM pension_institution pi
AND pi.institution_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.institutionName}, '%')
AND pi.supervise_account_status = #{params.accountStatus}
ORDER BY pi.institution_id

SELECT COUNT(*) as institutionCount, COALESCE(SUM( (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(transfer_amount), 0) FROM fund_transfer WHERE institution_id = pi.institution_id AND is_paid != '1' AND transfer_type != '3') + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(deposit_balance), 0) FROM account_info WHERE institution_id = pi.institution_id) + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(member_balance), 0) FROM account_info WHERE institution_id = pi.institution_id) - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(transfer_amount), 0) FROM fund_transfer WHERE institution_id = pi.institution_id AND transfer_type = '3' AND is_paid = '1') ), 0) as totalSupervisionBalance, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pension_institution WHERE supervise_account_status = '2') as frozenAccountCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pension_institution WHERE supervise_account_status = '3') as abnormalAccountCount FROM pension_institution pi
